---
title: atmos vendor config list
sidebar_label: list
sidebar_class_name: command
id: list
description: List raw vendor manifest setting paths.
---
import Intro from '@site/src/components/Intro'
import CastPlayer from '@site/src/components/CastPlayer'

<Intro>
List every editable dot-notation path across the root vendor manifest and any manifests
it imports, along with the file that defines each one, its type, and its value. There is
no flat alias for `list` — use this command directly.
</Intro>

<CastPlayer title="atmos vendor config list --help" src="/casts/screengrabs/atmos-vendor-config-list--help.cast" static chrome />

## Usage

```shell
atmos vendor config list [path-pattern] [--format <format>] [--delimiter <delimiter>] [--file <manifest>]
```

## Examples

```shell
# List every editable path.
atmos vendor config list

# Filter by a glob pattern.
atmos vendor config list 'spec.sources[*].version'

# Machine-readable output.
atmos vendor config list --format json
```

## Arguments

<dl>
  <dt>`[path-pattern]` (optional)</dt>
  <dd>A glob pattern to filter the listed paths (e.g. `spec.sources[*].version`).</dd>
</dl>

## Flags

<dl>
  <dt>`--file` (string, default `./vendor.yaml`)</dt>
  <dd>The vendor manifest file to list paths from (along with any manifests it imports).</dd>
  <dt>`--format` / `-f` (string, default `paths`)</dt>
  <dd>Output format: `paths`, `table`, `json`, `yaml`, `csv`, or `tsv`.</dd>
  <dt>`--delimiter` (string)</dt>
  <dd>Delimiter to use for `csv`/`tsv` output.</dd>
</dl>
